title: Implementation Patterns — NxGN Actions
purpose: **AI Summary**: Pattern reference for the Actions platform. Based on Capstone's vertical slice architecture, adapted for Actions' workflow automation domain with PostgreSQL RLS-based multi-tenancy. Patterns are split into API (backend) and Web (frontend) subdirectories, each with its own architecture overview and feature implementation guide. The full-stack flow document bridges them.

sections.title: Start Here
content: Use these patterns before adding or reviewing a feature:
1. Start with [API Overview](api-overview.md) and [Web Overview](web-overview.md).
2. For an end-to-end module, read [Full-Stack Flow](full-stack-flow.md).
3. For backend implementation, use [API Vertical Slice](api-vertical-slice.md), [API Endpoints](api-endpoints.md), and [API Feature Implementation](api-feature-implementation.md).

4. For Angular implementation, use [Web Feature Implementation](web-feature-implementation.md), [Web List Page](web-list-page.md), [Web Capture Page](web-capture-page.md), and [Web Capture State](web-capture-state.md).
These patterns document the implementation approach used by Workflows, Compliance Profiles, Deadline Types, Escalation Rules, and related client-side aggregate-root screens.

## Module Use
- Grid/list modules use `POST /api/v1/{entities}/grid-list`.
- Single-page aggregate editors can keep client-side aggregate state inside the routed component.
- Multi-route aggregate editors should use capture state as the client-side aggregate root.
- Feature-owned EF entities/configurations live under the owning feature unless they are truly shared.

sections.title: Coding Conventions
content: - **Primary constructors** for all classes (services, endpoints, queries, commands, mappers)
- **No `_privateField` naming** — use primary constructor parameter names directly (e.g., `dbContext` not `_dbContext`)
- **Enums over string constants** for all status, kind, and mode fields
- **DTO suffix is ALL CAPS** — `ActionDTO`, not `ActionDto`
- **IEntityTypeConfiguration\<T>** for all EF entity configurations (ADR-0018)
- **Translations from day one** — all user-facing text fields use the Capstone translation pattern

sections.title: ADR Index
content: | ADR | Decision | Affected Patterns |
| ADR-0010 | Command result pattern - commands return `CommandResult` variants for expected outcomes | [Commands](api-commands.md), [Endpoints](api-endpoints.md) |
| ADR-0011 | SaveRequest may inherit DTO, `Guid.Empty` Id for create detection | [Requests](api-requests.md), [Contracts](api-feature-implementation.md) |
| ADR-0012 | Zoneless Angular change detection | [Web Overview](web-overview.md) |
| ADR-0013 | Translation pattern for entity i18n | [DTOMapper](api-dto-mapper.md), [EntityMapper](api-entity-mapper.md), [Endpoints](api-endpoints.md) |
| ADR-0017 | Grid-list endpoints use POST `/grid-list` | [API Endpoints](api-endpoints.md), [Web Feature Implementation](web-feature-implementation.md) |
| ADR-0018 | `IEntityTypeConfiguration<T>` for EF entity configuration | [EF Configuration](api-ef-configuration.md), [API Feature Implementation](api-feature-implementation.md) |
| ADR-0023 | `as const` objects for frontend enum constants | [Enums](web-enums.md), [Feature Service](web-feature-service.md) |
| ADR-0024 | Vertical slice owns feature behavior and feature-owned persistence | [API Vertical Slice](api-vertical-slice.md), [API Feature Implementation](api-feature-implementation.md) |

sections.title: Current Implementation Notes
content: #### Established Implementation Approach
| Area | Current approach |
| Backend feature ownership | Endpoint folders own request-specific behavior; feature `Shared/` owns reusable helpers and feature-owned EF entities/configurations |
| Public contracts | DTOs and request/response contracts live in `Nxgn.Actions.Contracts`, usually grouped by module file |
| Grid APIs | Canonical route is `POST /api/v1/{entities}/grid-list`; `/grid` and `/server-grid` are aliases only |
| Angular standalone list pages | `nxgn-server-grid` binds to server-side grid-list endpoints through `GRID_ENDPOINTS` |
| Angular embedded child grids | `nxgn-data-grid` is reserved for child collections edited inside capture pages |
| Angular aggregate editors | Single-route editors keep aggregate state in the component; multi-route editors use capture state |
| Tests | Integration tests cover aggregate saves and grid behavior; browser E2E should set modules up through the UI for meaningful client validation |
#### Improvement Candidates
| Improvement | Reason |

| Add lightweight architecture guard tests | Catch accidental route regressions, missing DbContext configuration registration, misplaced public DTOs, or standalone lists using the wrong grid component |
| Extract helper services from very large save endpoints when complexity grows | Preserve testability without forcing layers for simple endpoint-specific behavior |
| Keep browser E2E plans aligned with seeded-client setup flows | Validate the client setup journey rather than only fixture data |
| Keep lex links current with `lex link suggest --module <CODE> --json` | Avoid docs that mention ref-codes without explicit graph links |
